scenarios.label: Pick or pass
scenarios.description: Seat 1 holds QD, JD, 9H, AS, 7C, JS and must PICK or PASS. (This seat goes on to pick.)

scenarios.label: Call a partner
scenarios.description: Seat 1 picked and now holds QD, JD, 9H, AS, 7C, JS, 7H, 8S (8 cards after the blind). It must choose a partner card — the two-tower CALL scorer is the live head here.

scenarios.label: Bury two cards
scenarios.description: Seat 1 (the picker) holds QD, JD, 9H, AS, 7C, JS, 7H, 8S and must bury its first card — the pointer head scores every hand slot.

scenarios.label: Lead trick 1
scenarios.description: Seat 1 (the picker) leads trick 1 with QD, JD, AS, 7C, JS, 8S. The trick is empty; memory now carries the pick phase.

scenarios.label: Follow late in the hand
scenarios.description: Trick 3: seat 5 (a defender) follows with 10C, KC, AD, QS after several cards hit the table. Trick tokens are live and the memory token carries every completed trick.
